title: rhamnus × intermedia subsp. istriaca
intro: Rhamnus × intermedia subsp. istriaca, also known as the Istrian buckthorn, is a hybrid plant species within the buckthorn family (Rhamnaceae) and is a cross between Rhamnus cathartica and Rhamnus alpina. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to support the health of the digestive system. The health benefits of Istrian buckthorn include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Istrian buckthorn can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
